steps.label: Create account screen
steps.description: User opens /signup and sees social sign-in plus email/password signup options.

steps.label: Choose auth method
steps.description: User continues with Google/Apple OAuth or submits email/password via /api/auth/verify-and-signup.

steps.label: Email confirmation pending
steps.description: Email-password path without immediate session shows the in-page Check your email state on /signup.

steps.label: OAuth provider handoff
steps.description: Social path redirects user to Google/Apple consent, then returns to /auth/callback.

steps.label: Auth callback exchange
steps.description: On /auth/callback, auth code/otp is exchanged for session and browser is replaced to next route (default /dashboard/briefing).

steps.label: First post-auth destination
steps.description: User lands on /dashboard/briefing (or /team/join/:token when seat_token exists), then onboarding guard runs.

steps.label: Onboarding gate redirect
steps.description: If onboarding_completed_at is missing, protected dashboard routes redirect user to /onboarding.

steps.label: Onboarding: name
steps.description: Step 0: user provides name (or skips/quick-starts) in the onboarding wizard.

steps.label: Onboarding: role lane
steps.description: Step 1: user selects target role lane to set workflow and signal prioritization.

steps.label: Onboarding: search context
steps.description: Step 2 (advanced path): user sets current situation, timeline, and driver; some quick/low-energy paths bypass this.

steps.label: Onboarding: profile import/manual
steps.description: Step 3 (advanced path): user imports LinkedIn/PDF or enters title/company manually; may be skipped on quick paths.

steps.label: Onboarding: target companies
steps.description: Step 4: user adds at least one target company (with optional AI suggestions).

steps.label: Onboarding: briefing time
steps.description: Step 5: user picks briefing time; quick/passive flows can route directly to completion state.

steps.label: Onboarding: first value preview
steps.description: Step 6: user sees shortlist/value preview and submits Start my search or Start monitoring.

steps.label: Dashboard start checklist
steps.description: completeOnboarding or skipOnboarding redirects to /dashboard/start for post-setup tasks.

steps.label: Main product reached
steps.description: User proceeds into core product surfaces such as /dashboard and /dashboard/briefing with onboarding complete.
